feed.title: Minchin.ca - Comments: Seven Things I’ve Learned Blogging

entry.title: Posted by: Wm. Minchin
entry.summary:
Some satelite TV stations are similiarly commercial free, and the “tax” comes in the form of your subscription fees. I wonder what the CBC would be like without commercials…?

I guess it goes to reiterate there is a cost to most things, even if we don’t pay it out …
entry.content:
Some satelite TV stations are similiarly commercial free, and the “tax” comes in the form of your subscription fees. I wonder what the CBC would be like without commercials…?

I guess it goes to reiterate there is a cost to most things, even if we don’t pay it out of pocket.

entry.title: Posted by: Kyle P
entry.summary: In the UK one pays a ‘TV tax’, as a result they watch the BBC without commercials. Not sure if it is worth it, but the tax is mandatory.
entry.content: In the UK one pays a ‘TV tax’, as a result they watch the BBC without commercials. Not sure if it is worth it, but the tax is mandatory.
